recommended_for_human_review.reason: Recall-first operating point. On held-out test patches it keeps recall at about 0.999 with precision about 0.804, meaning it misses very few shell-containing PV patches while accepting more false positives for human review.

more_balanced_backup.reason: Still very recall-heavy. Test patch recall is about 0.998 with precision about 0.819, and pixel-mask recall is about 0.705.

avoid_for_screening.reason: Too conservative for the current goal. Test patch precision is high, but pixel-mask recall drops to about 0.380 and patch recall drops to about 0.962.
